initial_email.description: The initial cold outreach email that was sent (Touch 1).

sent_date.description: ISO 8601 date the initial email was sent. Used to calculate absolute send dates for each follow-up touch.

name.description: Prospect's first name (used for personalization in touches).

context.description: Optional additional context to inform the follow-up angles — e.g. product details, sender company name, available social proof stats, upcoming events, or relevant resources to share.
